findings.title: Header-only cpp-httplib without version pinning
findings.description: cpp-httplib included as header-only library without version tracking; stale versions have request parsing and DoS vulnerabilities

findings.title: Header-only nlohmann/json without version pinning
findings.description: nlohmann/json included as header-only library without version tracking; older versions have stack overflow and precision issues

findings.title: Missing security hardening compiler flags
findings.description: Makefile omits -fstack-protector-strong, -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2, -fPIE, and RELRO linker flags

findings.title: Outdated pthread usage without thread sanitizer support
findings.description: Build configuration lacks sanitizer support for detecting concurrency issues in mutex-protected data structures
